confusion: The README could be clearer about the exact structure of the test files and snapshots needed
improvements: Add more detailed examples of test files and snapshot structure
Improve error messages when files are missing or malformed
summary: The Integration Contract Regression Gate tool works as expected. It correctly passes when the test trace matches the baseline and fails when there are differences. The tool generates appropriate JSON reports and handles the test cases correctly. The main confusion is around the exact structure of test files and snapshots needed, which could be better documented in the README.
